mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user (
id,
create_time, update_time,
passport_id, organ_id, email, mobile, real_name, admin,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admin, jdbcType=TINYINT},
0,
0 )

INSERT INTO user ( id, create_time, update_time, passport_id, organ_id, email, mobile, real_name, admin, delete_flag, version ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admin, jdbcType=TINYINT}, 0, 0 )

INSERT INTO user (
id,
create_time, update_time,
passport_id, organ_id, email, mobile, real_name, admin,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.organId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.admin, jdbcType=TINYINT},
0,
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
passport_id = #{passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
admin = #{admin, jdbcType=TINYINT},
email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, real_name = #{realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE user
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
passport_id = #{passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
admin = #{admin, jdbcType=TINYINT},
email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, real_name = #{realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE user
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
passport_id = #{passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
admin = #{admin, jdbcType=TINYINT},
email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, real_name = #{realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE user
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
passport_id, organ_id, email, mobile, real_name, admin,
delete_flag,
version FROM user WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT id, create_time, update_time, passport_id, organ_id, email, mobile, real_name, admin, delete_flag, version FROM user WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
passport_id, organ_id, email, mobile, real_name, admin,
delete_flag,
version FROM user
SELECT id, create_time, update_time, passport_id, organ_id, email, mobile, real_name, admin, delete_flag, version FROM user
